diagrams.title: Backward Chaining vs Forward Chaining
diagrams.description: Comparison of inference directions in both chaining methods
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental difference between the two chaining approaches

diagrams.title: Proof Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Hierarchical tree showing how a goal is proven through sub-goals to facts
diagrams.purpose: Visualize goal decomposition and proof construction in backward chaining

diagrams.title: Goal Stack Operation
diagrams.description: LIFO stack showing how goals are pushed and popped during reasoning
diagrams.purpose: Understand goal management and the working memory in backward chaining

diagrams.title: Backtracking Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step showing how system returns to try alternatives on failure
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend how backward chaining handles failures and explores alternatives
